prompt: How does ADS Lozenge map to VPK? I see there's a lozenge.tsx in components/ui — what ADS visual states does it need and what's the mapping?

assertions.name: produces-mapping-table
assertions.description: Output includes a structured ADS variant → VPK variant mapping table

assertions.name: preserves-shadcn-naming
assertions.description: Variant names stay as shadcn convention (default, secondary, etc.) — not renamed to ADS names (bold, subtle, etc.)

assertions.name: identifies-state-tokens
assertions.description: Uses ADS token triplets (rest/hovered/pressed) rather than generic opacity/color patterns

assertions.name: references-computed-styles
assertions.description: Mentions or uses computed style extraction from live ADS page rather than guessing from token names

assertions.name: fills-audit-template
assertions.description: Produces a structured audit of current component state vs needed ADS styling
